title: Change Registered Office of Company Service in Kerala- BookMyTM - Trademark & ISO Services in KeralaHow to Change Registered Office of a Company?
h1: How to Change Registered Office of a Company?

blocks.text: How to Change Registered Office of a Company?

The registered office of the company will be the address where a company is registered or incorporated and the same address will be used by all government authorities to make official communications with the company. The registered office address of the company will be displayed in the master data of the company and the changes in the registered office address must be updated with Ministry of Corporate Affairs even though office changed with in the same city. Specified process to be followed to change the registered office address is prescribed at Companies Act. Consent from shareholders and approval from concerned RoC is mandatory for registered office change and the process of registered office change depends on where to the office is shifted to, ie: within the city, within the jurisdiction of RoC or to other State.
Fill the details below for a callback.
Documents Required for Change of Registered Address of Company
Electricity/Telephone Bill or any other latest utility bill of the new address
No Objection Certificate from the owner of the registered office
Digital Signature Certificate of one of authorized director
Rent Agreement of the office building if it is rented.

items.q: 1. Can a registered office be a residential property?
items.a: Answer:Yes, there is no compulsion for the registered office to be a commercial property. It can be a residential or commercial address. Accendoz+9Accendoz+9Accendoz+9

items.q: 2. When should the RoC be informed about the change in registered office?
items.a: Answer:The ROC must be notified of the change within 30 days of moving premises by filing the appropriate documents. If the office is shifted outside the state, prior approval from both the ROC and Regional Director (RD) is required. Accendoz

items.q: 3. Does changing the office require alteration of the Memorandum of Association (MoA)?
items.a: Answer:Not if the new registered office remains within the same state. However, if moving to a different state, the “situation clause” in the MoA must be updated. Accendoz

items.q: 4. What records must be maintained at the registered office?
items.a: Answer:All statutory books of account must be kept at the registered office. If they're stored elsewhere in India, the company must notify the ROC in writing, specifying the full address where the records are kept. Accendoz+6Accendoz+6Accendoz+6
